ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Australia and New Zealand, Central and Southern Asia) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the region (e.g., ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region for the latest available year */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_data" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the data is collected */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period for which the data is collected */,
  "food_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food type */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Food consumption value for the region and time period */,
  "consumption_per_capita" REAL /* Consumption value per capita for the region and time period */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend indicator (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., FAO, WHO, local surveys) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_food_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_type_id") REFERENCES food_types ("food_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_types" (
  "food_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food type */,
  "food_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the food type (e.g., grains, fruits, vegetables) */,
  "food_type_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the food type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the time period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the time period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
